zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Picquigny於1225年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆皮易尼時，她的父親Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens24歲，母親Laure de Montfort20歲。她和Gauthier IV de Heilly至少有6個兒子和8個女兒。她去世於1279年在法國皮卡迪索姆海利享年54歲。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Picquigny was born in 1225, in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens, was 24 and her mother, Laure de Montfort, was 20. She had at least 6 sons and 8 daughters with Gauthier IV de Heilly. She died in 1279, in Heilly, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Picquigny est née en 1225, à Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Laure de Montfort, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles avec Gauthier IV de Heilly. Elle est décédée en 1279, à Heilly, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Picquigny 1225 in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens 24 und ihre Mutter Laure de Montfort 20. Sie hatte mit Gauthier IV de Heilly mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1279 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Picquigny è nata il nel 1225 nel Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Laure de Montfort, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie con Gauthier IV de Heilly. Morì nel 1279, nel Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Picquignyが1225年にフランスピカーディソンメピククイグニーで生まれた時，父Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiensは24歳，母Laure de Montfortは20歳であった。彼女はGauthier IV de Heillyとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1279年にフランスピカーディソンメヘイリーで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Picquigny(이)가 1225년 프랑스 피카디 솜 피c키그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Laure de Montfort(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Gauthier IV de Heilly(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1279년 프랑스 피카디 솜 헤이리에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Picquigny nasceu em 1225, em Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Laure de Montfort, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas com Gauthier IV de Heilly. Ela faleceu em 1279, em Heilly, Somme, Picardie, França, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Picquigny родилась в 1225 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Laure de Montfort, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей от Gauthier IV de Heilly. Она умерла в 1279 г. в местности хилли, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Picquigny nació en 1225, en Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Laure de Montfort, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas con Gauthier IV de Heilly. Murió en 1279, en Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 54 años.
